extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João won the sprint from reduced group after four-rider break absorbed late; LUTSENKO defended GC by staying front throughout closing laps
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO positioned extremely forward throughout three finishing circuits, revealing defensive GC tactics prioritizing crash avoidance over energy conservation.
Four-man break absorbed despite containing strong time trialist van HOYEN, suggesting sponsor pressure for sprint finish overrode tactical patience.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: maintained front position through entire finishing circuit sequence, avoiding KRISTOFF's crash fate
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: crashed and abandoned on final stage despite attempting 10th Oman completion, suggests fatigue compromise
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: won sprint despite BANI creating bumping/barging chaos, demonstrating composure in physical finishes
